title: Book Content File
description: Describes the hierarchical structure of a text (volume → book → chapter → verse).

slug.description: Kebab-case identifier. Used as the book's slug in the registry.

type.description: User-defined label (volume, book, chapter, etc.). The renderer ignores this value.

description.description: Summary text for the root node.

url_template.description: URL with {index} placeholder (1-based leaf position). Inherited by descendant nodes.

slug.description: Kebab-case identifier, unique within the file.

type.description: User-defined label (volume, book, chapter, verse, etc.). The renderer ignores this value.

description.description: Summary text. Leaf nodes (no children): one sentence, max 90 characters. Non-leaf nodes: no length limit.

url_template.description: URL with {index} placeholder (1-based leaf position). Inherited by descendant nodes.

children.description: Child nodes. Absent on leaf nodes.
